race.comment: FINCHAVEN (3) jumped out well and then started a $3F t Kyneton on debut over 1108m proving too good. He made up plenty of ground and it was a good effort. She's been kept on the fresh side, and the longer sprint is sure to suit. She won't have to improve much to take the next step. HERE COMES WOZZA (4) is a candidate to lead and brings a string of narrow defeats. Keeps improving and will be right in it. COME ALONG JEFFREY (1) is heading in the right direction and will be fitter gain. He is free-running as well, and the 4kg claim brings him right into it. RATTLE'N'ROLL (7) was around the mark resuming at Seymour for the new barn. He's placed 2/3 second-up, but an outside gate makes it tough.
